name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.StayUprightHelper.NoSupportForceMult
summary: Still apply this fraction of the upright constaint force if the foot is not in a position (defined by supportPosition) to generate the support for the upright constraint.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
